prompt: Generate a minimalist modern magazine-style illustration based on a photo. The image uses clean and smooth lines to shape the form, with a simple yet aesthetic design. The background retains a large area of white space, and the color palette is primarily soft neutral tones, with small amounts of vibrant color added as visual focal points. The overall composition is refined and balanced, with an elegant and fresh atmosphere, possessing the texture of high-end magazine illustrations and modern art posters, with no text.
